title: myaris inaequalis
intro: Myaris inaequalis, also known as the Japanese angelica tree, is a species of plant native to East Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Myaris inaequalis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, as well as its ability to treat various respiratory issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Myaris inaequalis include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's roots or leaves in hot water or a solvent.
